result: The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The R script loaded all 7 input files from data/input/, merged them using full_join by NSID, converted wave-specific missing codes to standard codes, created age-specific variables (urb15, urb16, gor15, gor16, gor32, nation32), created derived binary variables (urb_binary, gor_binary), and saved the cleaned output to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with the following variables: NSID, urb15, urb16, gor15, gor16, gor32, nation32, urb_binary, gor_binary.
